task_completion.description: Import or open the lookout_mtn_centerline.dxf file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A CAD, GIS, or surveying application is open, and there is an attempt to load 'lookout_mtn_centerline.dxf' via an open/import dialog, or the file is successfully loaded in the viewport.

task_completion.description: Configure the point generation tool for 25-meter intervals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box, tool panel, or command line within the application for point generation/stationing showing an interval setting of '25' or '25.0'.

task_completion.description: Generate the survey points along the centerline geometry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Points are visibly generated and displayed at regular intervals along the centerline geometry in the application's main viewport.

task_completion.description: Export the generated points to station_points.csv including X, Y, and Z coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog showing the filename 'station_points.csv' with options selected/visible for X, Y, and Z coordinate fields, or a file explorer showing the newly created CSV file.
A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename 'stationed_alignment.top' being saved to the Documents folder, or the application title bar reflecting this new project name.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI of a CAD/GIS application rather than writing a script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a graphical application's menus, toolbars, and dialogs, rather than just a terminal, IDE, or text editor.

integrity.description: Points were generated using the application's built-in tools, not manually typed or mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: Use of stationing/point generation tools in the UI rather than a text editor creating a fake CSV file with hardcoded values.

integrity.description: The agent actually navigated the save/export dialogs to create the required files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of 'Save As' or 'Export' dialog boxes being actively used to set filenames and formats, rather than terminal 'touch' commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires generating at least 25 survey points at exactly 25.0m intervals along the centerline from 'lookout_mtn_centerline.dxf'. The points must be exported to 'station_points.csv' with X, Y, and Z coordinates, and the project saved as 'stationed_alignment.top'. Note: The task environment is known to be defective as the input DXF file is completely missing from the environment; the agent will likely fail to locate or open the file. Score based on any visible progress or correct tool usage attempted before the inevitable failure.
